title: Trace where an injected instance comes from
description: Resolve which provider supplies a dependency and how many instances exist across the injector tree.
body: Steps: 1. Find every place the service is provided (providedIn, module providers, component/route providers). 2. Determine the injector hierarchy for the consuming component (element injector up to root). 3. Identify which provider the consumer resolves against and whether that yields a shared or per-component instance. 4. If state is unexpectedly split or shared, move the provider to the correct level. 5. Confirm with a test. Rollback point: before changing provider placement. Validation: a test asserts the expected number of instances and that shared state is consistent.
